---
title: "Computational Marketing"
subtitle: "Research & Teaching | University of Liverpool"
page-layout: full
---

## Welcome

This site documents research and teaching outputs from the Computational Marketing group
at the University of Liverpool, Marketing Department.

---

## Teaching

| Module | Term | Materials |
|---|---|---|
| Machine Learning for Marketing (MKTS 301) | Spring 2026 | [Slides](#) · [Labs](#) |
| Data Visualisation for Marketing (MKTS 215) | Spring 2026 | [Slides](#) · [Labs](#) |
| Introduction to Deep Learning (MKTS 420) | Spring 2026 | [Slides](#) · [Labs](#) |

---

## Research

Current working papers:

- **Brand Activism and Consumer Response** — NLP analysis of brand social media
- **Influencer Marketing Effectiveness** — ML-based causal estimation
- **Causal NLP in Marketing** — Text-as-treatment identification strategies

---

## Interactive Demos

- [Churn Prediction Simulator](#) — Streamlit · Render
- [Embedding Similarity Explorer](#) — Gradio · Hugging Face Spaces
- [Sentiment Classifier](#) — Gradio · Hugging Face Spaces
